data.title: Changes of the Neuronal Activity in the Subthalamic Nucleus Under Propofol Sedation During Stereotactic Electrode Implantation.
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to detect possible changes in the electrical activity of the Basal Ganglia related to sedation during deep brain stimulation surgery.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Candidate for Deep Brain Stimulation Surgery.
* Informed concent obtained.

Exclusion Criteria:

* Suspected difficult intubation (by history or physical examination).
* Allergy to Propofol, eggs or soy-beans.
* History of sleep apnea syndrome.
endpoints: Changes in the electrical activity of neuron cells of the basal ganglia in the examined patients
